top_signals.title: MinRes reboots Bald Hill lithium mine after 18-month pause
top_signals.summary: MinRes said it expects to begin ramp-up activities soon, followed by crushing and mining operations next month.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: The Shock Is Dead, Long Live the Shock!
top_signals.summary: Constant disruptions can’t really be labeled as ‘one-offs.’

top_signals.title: SpaceX’s Mega-IPO Puts a Price on the Fear of Missing Out
top_signals.summary: Elon Musk has turned science fiction into reality for the better part of two decades, making believers rich and earning the benefit of the doubt from many on Wall Street. Away from rockets and electric cars, his companies are bending reality on another plane – convincing analysts to stretch their traditional valuation tools, and assign multiples based on what one academic calls “optionalities.”

top_signals.title: NextEra bets there’s no such thing as having too much power
top_signals.summary: There are few obvious areas of overlap between Dominion Energy and its Florida rival

top_signals.title: EU ban on Russian uranium to boost Canadian exports
top_signals.summary: Europe’s effort to curb Russian nuclear fuel dependence is creating new long-term opportunities for Cameco and other Western suppliers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump leaves Beijing with no rare earth deal confirmed
top_signals.summary: Rare earths had emerged as one of the most closely watched topics of Trump's two-day summit in China.

top_signals.title: MAX Power Mining, Moose Jaw to advance natural hydrogen commercialization

top_signals.title: Water shortages are quietly killing mining projects — new tech rises to fix it
top_signals.summary: For decades, water sat at the periphery of mining analysis—a logistical consideration, but rarely a dealbreaker. That has changed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Op-Ed: Bankable rules matter as much as critical minerals
top_signals.summary: Greenland’s Kvanefjeld dispute underscores how regulatory uncertainty can undermine Western critical-minerals ambitions.
